mapper.select: select id, bank_name, product_name, product_type from cb_financial_product order by id asc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
mapper.update: update cb_financial_product set bank_code = #{bankCode}, bank_name = #{bankName}, product_name = #{productName}, product_type = #{productType}, admission_conditions = #{admissionConditions}, product_intro = #{productIntro}, business_manager = #{businessManager}, contact_info = #{contactInfo}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
